entry.title: Re: How to attach FE OP Controller Extension function to...
entry.content:
this should work, but where is your myFunction. can you also try model.attachDataReceived

onAfterRendering: function () {
  var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();
  oModel.attachEvent('dataReceived', myFunction);
},

entry.title: Re: My ControllerExtension calls Standard Worklist Contro...

try this.

override: {
CreateButtonsEnableCheck: function(e, i) {

var that=this;
MessageBox.alert("Button Clicked...");
ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.pr.prcss.s1.controller.Worklist.prototype.CreateButtonsEnableCheck.apply(that, arguments);
}
}

entry.title: Re: My ControllerExtension calls Standard Worklist Contro...
entry.content: I've tried that as well. Same results.

entry.title: Re: Impact of ignoreErrors on Active Index in SolrIndexCo...
entry.content:
Hello! 

When you enable ignoreErrors, the goal is to prevent small problems from stopping the entire indexing process. The indexing job will continue running and log any errors it encounters along the way. However, whether the active index gets updated with data from a partially completed index depends on various factors, such as how the indexing job is set up.

Usually, a new index needs to be fully completed before it can replace or update the active index. If there are critical errors that stop the index from finishing, then the active index might not be updated. It's important to check the logs to see what errors occurred and understand how they might affect the completeness and accuracy of the new index.

Best regards,
Stephane
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Do you want to acquire foundational knowledge of SAP Business Data Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi! 

Understanding the architecture in the learning right- SAP BDC is a landscape of different interconnected components: existing like "Datasphere" and new like "Foundation Services".

Can you please share an overall capability map of the BDC? 

THX

Ralf

entry.title: Excel Upload Using RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently facing an issue with the file upload requirement using RAP model where the business needs to upload .XLS/.XLSX file from a custom RAP application. At the moment, we have successfully built the custom RAP app, which allows the upload of .CSV files, and we are able to process and alter the data as required. However, we are struggling to find a solution for uploading .XLS/.XLSX files.

Although we receive the data in RAWSTRING format using the Read Entity statement, we are unable to convert the RAWSTRING to our internal table. We are using the cl_abap_conv_codepage=>create_in()->convert method, but the system throws a dump at line: 'SYSTEM-CALL CONVERT ID 44' when attempting to call the convert method for .XLS/.XLSX files.

I have gone through multiple blogs shared on SAP Communities, but most solutions focus on uploading .CSV files. Could anyone provide guidance on this issue? We have several custom app development requirements, and this functionality will serve as a base for all of our file upload processes. Any priority support on this matter would be greatly appreciated!

For reference, I am pasting my uploadExcel method code below:

METHOD uploadexceldata.

READ ENTITIES OF zc_head_upd IN LOCAL MODE

ENTITY zc_head_upd

ALL FIELDS WITH

CORRESPONDING #( keys )

RESULT DATA(lt_inv).

 

** Get attachment value from the instance

DATA(lv_attachment) = lt_inv[ 1 ]-attachment.

 

** Data declarations

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_excel_data,

mandt TYPE mandt,

svono TYPE aufnr,

startday TYPE char10,

zgroup TYPE char10,

area TYPE char10,

revtx TYPE revtx,

duration TYPE char2,

shift TYPE char2,

pitchid TYPE char50,

startpitch TYPE char4,

seq TYPE char2,

id TYPE char50,

lastchangedat TYPE abp_lastchange_tstmpl,

END OF ty_excel_data.

 

DATA: rows TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string,

content TYPE string,

conv TYPE REF TO cl_abap_conv_codepage,

ls_excel_data TYPE ty_excel_data,

lt_excel_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_excel_data, "zps_dataupd_itm,

lt_excel_data_final TYPE TABLE OF zps_dataupd_itm,

lv_date TYPE char40,

lv_svono TYPE aufnr,

lv_timestamp TYPE timestampl.

 

DATA: lt_table TYPE TABLE OF standard.

 

GET TIME STAMP FIELD lv_timestamp.

lv_date = lv_timestamp.

 

content = cl_abap_conv_codepage=>create_in( )->convert( lv_attachment ).

 

** Split the string table to rows

SPLIT content AT cl_abap_char_utilities=>cr_lf INTO TABLE rows.

 

** Process the rows and append to the internal table

LOOP AT rows INTO DATA(ls_row) FROM 2.

SPLIT ls_row AT ',' INTO ls_excel_data-revtx

ls_excel_data-zgroup

ls_excel_data-svono

ls_excel_data-area

ls_excel_data-startday

ls_excel_data-duration

ls_excel_data-shift

ls_excel_data-pitchid

ls_excel_data-startpitch

ls_excel_data-seq

ls_excel_data-id.

 

ls_excel_data-lastchangedat = lv_date.

 

APPEND ls_excel_data TO lt_excel_data.

 

* LOOP AT lt_excel_data ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

* <fs>-last_changed_at = lv_date.

* ENDLOOP.

 

 

CLEAR: ls_row, ls_excel_data.

 

LOOP AT lt_excel_data ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_excel_data>).

APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_excel_data_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_excel_final>).

MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_excel_data> TO <fs_excel_final>.

ENDLOOP.

 

MODIFY zps_dataupd_itm FROM TABLE lt_excel_data_final.

CLEAR: lt_excel_data, lt_excel_data_final.

ENDLOOP.

 

ENDMETHOD.

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP Finance and Spend Management - Cloud Onboarding Services
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce the launch of a new Continuous Quality Check service (CQC) specifically for Customer Onboarding! Now all customers can request a 1:1 Onboarding session covering important topics such as initial system access and s-user setup, SAP for Me, SAP Support, learning and enablement options, implementation planning, and product innovation.

This offering will be extremely valuable both to new customers looking to kickstart their implementations as well as existing customers who need a refresher. The CQC is currently available for SAP Ariba, SAP Fieldglass and SAP Business Network. For more information, access the one pager on the CQC page.

entry.title: Re: Which KPI's do you have in software development?

In this respect I also recommend https://www.langlebige-softwarearchitekturen.de

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
@SharathSundar I am not able to access the demo video link. I entered my email ID and keep getting this message. Sorry, this email address isn't associated with this secure link. Please contact the person who shared it with you.
2q.) When inferring and using AI architecture to pull the skills will it also set the proficiency level for the skill. Lets say we mention Excellent communication skills and Strong coding skills will it set to 5 as expected proficiency level?
3q.) Are skills inferred only from job profile object or can it infer also from job postings made basis  the job profile. 

Regards,

Prince

entry.title: Exploring the Potential of SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Why SAP Business Data Cloud Matters

Data is the backbone of modern businesses. Companies that effectively analyze and leverage their data unlock valuable insights, much like striking gold—the deeper the analysis, the greater the rewards. SAP Business Data Cloud aims to break down data silos, allowing businesses to seamlessly connect data across SAP applications, third-party sources, and multiple business domains.

One of the most significant capabilities of SAP Business Data Cloud is its integration with Databricks, a market leader in data engineering and AI-powered analytics. This collaboration enables businesses to generate domain-specific insights by combining structured and unstructured data while reducing redundancy. Unlike traditional data solutions that require multiple copies of the same dataset, SAP Business Data Cloud enables zero-copy data access, making it particularly valuable for enterprises dealing with petabytes of data.

How Joule Enhances SAP Business Data Cloud

One of the standout features of SAP Business Data Cloud is its integration with Joule, SAP’s business AI assistant. What sets Joule apart from traditional Large Language Models (LLMs) is its deep business context and enterprise-grade data intelligence.

Joule’s architecture operates through the following key components:

 User Request Processing

  • When a user submits a request, Joule understands the prompt, analyzes relevant business scenarios, and applies data filtering via the Knowledge Catalog.

Knowledge Catalog

  • This repository contains both SAP data and customer-specific data, ensuring that responses are tailored to business needs.

Retrieval Augmented Generation for Enterprises (RAGe)

  • The output process leverages RAGe, an advanced AI methodology, ensuring responses are generated with reliable, context-aware business insights.

AI Hub and Vector Engine

  • The AI Hub integrates business context with SAP data, enhancing Joule’s ability to deliver accurate, business-centric queries from LLMs.

Driving Business Success with Unified Data

With SAP Business Data Cloud, Joule, and Databricks, organizations can unify enterprise data sources and unlock deeper insights tailored to various Lines of Business (LOBs). This intelligent data unification will empower companies to:
     

  • Eliminate redundant data storage
  • Generate multi-dimensional insights
  • Enhance AI-driven decision-making
  • Unlock revenue potential through data-driven strategies

By leveraging AI-powered analytics and zero-copy data integration, SAP is setting the stage for the next era of business intelligence, enabling companies to maximize data value while maintaining efficiency and security. 

Here is the link SAP Business Data Cloud preview

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App subscription failed
entry.content:
The same happens to me, also in the BTP trial.
I tried first with the booster. Then I removed the failed subscription and tried manually subscription by the market place, but again failed.
According to https://help.sap.com/docs/BUILD_APPS/431746e4c663458aa68d9754b237bfc6/prerequisites, "SAP Build Apps only supports the OpenID authentication method. Using SAML results in a subscription failure. "
I checked the Trust Configuration in my subaccount and found the Default Identity Provider as well as the Custom IAS tenant use OpenID Connect

entry.title: Re: Exploring the Potential of SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: Thank you, Hari, A very effective easy to understand gist of details.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now experience for content authors after migra...
entry.content:
Hi Tracey,

There are definitely some differences between how you start Producer for On Premise versus how you start Producer for the Cloud solution and after opening Producer for the Cloud version you cannot switch between Workspaces.  However, you can open Producer for multiple Workspaces simultaneously, if you like.

Producer is very similar in both solutions, it's likely even the same executable code.  The really big differences between the two solutions are based on the Manager database.  If your version of Manager is installed on SQL Server, the Cloud version will have significantly more capability because it is installed on HANA.  If your On Premise version is already installed on HANA, the only major differences that you will notice, other than starting Producer and connecting to Workspaces, is if your version of On Premise is out of date.  Switching to Cloud obviously means that your system is permanently on the latest edition.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SUBMIT rfitemgl problem
entry.content:
Hi guys 

I'm using submit to get data from FBL3n and put it in an internal table. The problem is: When I execute submit it's displaying the fbl3n selection screen and I don't want that, see my code:

FORM f_get_and_fill_data .

  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_t_data> TYPE ANY TABLE,
                 <fs_s_data> TYPE any,
                 <fs_x_whs>  TYPE any,
                 <fs_saida>  TYPE ty_saida.

  DATA:  lf_ref              TYPE REF TO data,
         lt_texpr            TYPE rsds_texpr.

  " ********************************************************************
  " Chamada da Transação FBL3N
  " ********************************************************************

  " Ativa exportação de dados do ALV
  cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set(
    EXPORTING display  = abap_false
      metadata = abap_true
      data     = abap_true ).

*  SUBMIT zrsd242
*    WITH FREE SELECTIONS lt_texpr
*    WITH p_bukrs   EQ p_bukrs
*    WITH s_branch  IN s_branch
*    WITH s_docnum  IN s_docnum
*    WITH s_docdat  IN s_docdat
*    WITH s_oper    IN s_oper
*    WITH s_cat_nf  IN s_cat_nf
*    WITH p_j1b1n   EQ abap_false
*    WITH p_zt082   EQ abap_false
*    WITH p_dois    EQ abap_true
*    WITH r_detail  EQ abap_true
*    WITH r_sintet  EQ abap_false
*  USING SELECTION-SCREEN 1000 AND
*        RETURN EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY.

SUBMIT rfitemgl
WITH FREE SELECTIONS lt_texpr
  WITH p_SAKNR IN p_SAKNR
  WITH p_wlbuk IN p_wlbuk
  WITH p_budat IN p_budat
  WITH x_opsel  EQ abap_false
  WITH x_clsel  EQ abap_false
  WITH x_aisel  EQ abap_true
  WITH x_norm   EQ abap_true
*  WITH pa_vari  EQ '/OES_EXT'
  USING SELECTION-SCREEN 1000 AND
        RETURN EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY.

  " ********************************************************************
  " Recupera tabela ALV
  " ********************************************************************
  TRY.
      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref( IMPORTING r_data = lf_ref ).
      ASSIGN lf_ref->* TO <fs_t_data>.
    CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info.
      MESSAGE 'Erro ao recuperar dados do ALV - zt0388' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

  cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>clear_all( ).

  IF <fs_t_data>[] IS ASSIGNED.
    IF NOT <fs_t_data> IS INITIAL.
      LOOP AT <fs_t_data> ASSIGNING <fs_s_data>.
        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_s_data> TO gs_saida.
        gs_saida-datum = sy-datum.
        gs_saida-uzeit = sy-uzeit.
        APPEND gs_saida TO gt_saida.
      ENDLOOP.
    ELSE.
      MESSAGE text-e01 TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE text-e01 TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Step by Step "No root key matching hash" when recovering HANA Database with encrypted
entry.content: Very good article - clearly described, point by point. He helped me with backup.

entry.title: Re: A/P Invoice direct posting against more than one Cond...
entry.content:
Hi @Miche1984, 

Please refer to the following KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3465909
It's only available via Function module for manual settlement document creation. 
You will also need to update the configuration to allow a manual settlement to be related to several condition contracts. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP Platform 1909, Developer Edition: See New Blog Post
entry.content:
The passwords are on the github page: https://github.com/SAP-docs/abap-platform-trial-image

The SYSTEM password for SYSTEMDB and HDB are 1) the same and 2) in the link above.

You will need to create the container using -p 30215:30215 as part of the docker run command line if you want to expose the tenant SQL port outside the container.

Use:

docker exec -it a4h bash

#sudo -iu hdbadm

$ hdbsql -n vhcala4hci:30213 -d SYSTEMDB -u SYSTEM

<password>

to get access to the SYSTEMDB and

$ hdbsql -n vhcala4hci:30215 -d HDB -u SYSTEM

<password>

to get access to the tenant database.

SELECT * FROM M_DATABASE;

will show you what database you're in

(Probably loads of typos above)

entry.title: Re: Publish the terminated employees in worksheet to EC
entry.content:
Hi @vivekanandanp 

I tested today and was able to replicate your issue. 

As of now the only way to "publish back for selected employees" for inactive employees is to use the Import CSV feature linked right below the user search box. I tested that and it worked fine.

I talked to our Product team and they asked me to create a JIRA to have the user search fixed for inactive employees. I will do that and share JIRA # here.

All the best,
Xavier

entry.title: Re: Converting HTML to PDF in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Purayil,

ABAP doesn’t offer a built-in way to convert arbitrary HTML to PDF—it mainly supports conversion for SAP-specific formats like Smart Forms, SAPscript, or ALV lists. For your case, where you're working with dynamic HTML, you'll need to use an external solution.

One option is to use a dedicated HTML-to-PDF conversion API, such as PDFBolt. With such an API, you can send your HTML content via an HTTP request and receive a PDF in response, which you can then attach to your email using ABAP’s standard emailing functions (e.g., BCS).

Alternatively, if your environment allows, you might set up a command-line tool on your server that performs the conversion, and then call that tool from ABAP.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
@SharathSundar 

Hi Sharath,

We have ticket 63766/2025 open for a FAILED AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation Upgrade.

Marcos

entry.title: Mass maintenance of Risk ID and Rule ID for a Mitigation control ID
entry.content:
We are planning to replace the "*" for the rules maintained against the access risks in the mitigation control, the manual maintenance of mitigation allows to add the line items by clicking the Add button and then we need to enter the risk id vs rule ID text in it.

So I would like to check whether there is any mass tools available for updating the access risks vs rule ids in the mitigation control?

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

Alguém que utilize o Mastersaf DFE SaaS e que tenha aplicado as notas da NT 2023.004 v1.20, teve algum problema com relação ao novo campo CPF?

Mais precisamente quando a Forma de Importação é '1' (Importação por conta própria) e, consequentemente, os campos CNPJ e CPF não devem ser preenchidos. Nesse caso o campo CPF, que é numérico, fica '00000000000' na estrutura passada para a RFC. Até aí, tudo bem.

No entanto, o XML está sendo gerado com a tag do CPF preenchida com "zeros" e com isso o DFE retorna o erro "conteúdo inválido.

A Thomson, desenvolvedora do Mastersaf DFE, insiste que não há problemas nas rotinas deles.

Qualquer ajuda é bem vinda. Agradeço desde já.

entry.title: Recruiting
entry.content:
Hi

Offer Approval field is not getting populated .What could be the reason. The field is already filled at the source.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: The fastest way to a deployable CAP app on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
@daniel_schlachter 

Thank you for sharing this. I have tried `cds add workzone` in my TypeScript-enabled application generated by Fiori tools and found that the following parts of the code need to be updated.

manifest.json: The leading "/" of the uri must be removed.

 

    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "odata/v4/catalog/",

 

ui5-deploy.yaml: ui5-tooling-transpile-task needed to be added to generate .js files.

 

  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: ui5-task-zipper
      afterTask: generateVersionInfo
      configuration:
        archiveName: books-ui
        additionalFiles:
          - xs-app.json

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App subscription failed
entry.content:
Hello, I am having the same issue. I even tried deleting my BTP trial account and starting from scratch (running the Booster again), and I am facing the same issue.

Wonder if this could be a general issue for all BTP accounts. It was working fine few days ago.

entry.title: Calibration Sessions from Prior Years
entry.content:
Hello! I am new to using this community. We are getting ready to launch Calibration Sessions for our Performance Review Cycle for 2024. The Calibration Sessions from 2023 are still showing in the list for users. 

How do I "hide" or "not show" the prior year Calibration Sessions and only show the ones "In Progress."

I tested "Finalizing" them and "Deactivating" them hoping they would not show on the list. Please help! 

Example attached, when in SAP, if I click on "HOME" then click on "CALIBRATION" the attached screen shot still shows the prior years Calibrations in the list. 

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals 

Thank you!

entry.title: Is it possible to create a QR code directly from Crystal Reports?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have little experience with Crystal Reports, but as part of my job I have been asked to create a report in which some data and a QR code are displayed from the information contained in two of the database fields. Is it possible to create a QR code directly from Crystal Reports? Can you help me by telling me how QR codes can be created in Crystal Reports or where I can obtain information on this topic?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Upload Tax Rates -SAP S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We are trying to upload tax rates and tried with one entry as follows. We followed the template but the upload fails. 

#000001 36(Level1- 8 characters) 00(Level2-8 characters) 029A0 (Level3- 8 characters) 8(Lever4- 8 characters) 4(Jurisdiction Code Level Indicator-1 character) o1 (Tax Code-2 characters) 1 ( "Tax Code Type"-1 character) 20240701(Date Changed-8 characters) Sales tax, 6% State, 1% County, 1% City ("Jurisdiction Code Description-50 characters), 1 space, reserved, 8000(8*100*1000) ( "Tax Rate- 11 digits),  X (DiN indicator- 1 character), X(TxN indicator- 1 character )20250101(Valid From Date-8 characters)

Total of 122 characters in each line.

We already entered this jurisdiction code in the system. 

All seems to be good from our end, but the file is not getting uploaded. It says that the tax rate is wrong. 

What is wrong in this record. 

Thanks for any help with this. 

Lakshmi

entry.title: SAP Standard Kafka Integration Options
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a SAP Standard integration betweeen Kafka and R3/HANA to replace HANA Streaming Analytics.

We need to replace  HANA Streaming Analytics because it is going out of support (cant find the note at the moment) and somehow even more important the installtion guide for the kafka adapters wants extremely old kafka-client jar files as well some some avro jars that have CVEs and do not have any updates.

Our existing R3/Oracle uses PO and a 3rd party adapter for Kafka but the performance is not great so we were hoping for a much better solution.

We are onpremise on RHEL.

Any pointers would be appreciated.

regards

Angelo

entry.title: Re: Accessing MIGO Through Fiori Launchpad on Mobile Device
entry.content:
We discussed this topic within the Personas team, and if we understand the situation correctly, the problem is that when using a mobile device, the classic app MIGO is disabled in Public Cloud. Therefore, the tile accessing it is disabled in FLP. However, it is possible to access this app when using a desktop browser.

If our understanding is correct, then there could be a possibility to create a custom tile based on this blog post. A tile pointing to a URL utilizing the webgui or mobgui service should do the trick.

Of course, it is necessary to configure Personas access via an assignment category and setting the default flavor for users to the intended MIGO parent flavor. The adaptive flavor selection will then take care of using the appropriate flavor for the device.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Tenant DB tables connection with another Tenant
entry.content:
Schema mapping remains the feature that satisfies this requirement; please see Map Authoring Schema to the Physical Schema of the SAP HANA Modeling Guide for SAP HANA Studio.

Since you are performing cross-database access, you need to include the source and target databases in your mapping as per the note in the documentation:

entry.title: Re: How to use Derived RAP Business Events and enhance the standard SAP payload and add custom Filte
entry.content: @saurabhkumbhare Yes, it would work for S4 On prem, the example shown in this blog was done on S4 On premise system.

entry.title: Re: How to attach FE OP Controller Extension function to...
entry.content:
I tried your solution. To be sure I created a new project.

onAfterRendering: function () {
  console.log('onAfterRendering');

  var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();
  oModel.attachEvent(
    'dataReceived',
    function(oEvent) {
      console.log('dataReceived');
    }
  );
}

 It results in 

ODataModel-dbg.js:509  Uncaught (in promise) Error: Unsupported event 'dataReceived': v4.ODataModel#attachEvent
    at w.attachEvent (ODataModel-dbg.js:509:10)
    at f.onAfterRendering (RunObjectPageControllerExtension.controller.js:21:12)
    at o.<computed> [as onAfterRendering] (ControllerExtension-dbg.js:174:21)
    at b.fireEvent (EventProvider-dbg.js:247:11)
    at d.fireEvent (Element-dbg.js:626:23)
    at f.fireAfterRendering (ManagedObjectMetadata-dbg.js:789:44)
    at g.onAfterRendering (View-dbg.js:752:3)
    at d._handleEvent (Element-dbg.js:342:21)
    at h1 (RenderManager-dbg.js:1285:15)
    at i1 (RenderManager-dbg.js:1370:4)

 When I debug attachEvent, only events messageChange and sessionTimeout are supported. UI5 version is 1.102.2.

entry.title: Re: Stock Transfer between two EWM Managed plants assigne...
entry.content:
Ideally 2 plants assigned to one warehouse and doing a SLOC to SLOC via Bin to Bin should not be a scenario.

You can achieve it if you do not assign any availability group to Storage Types that will allow you to do bin to bin and then you will have to do a posting change of Ownership/PartyEntitled. That will post the stock to other SLOC.

entry.title: Custom field appearing twice
entry.content:
Hi,

In our public cloud environment, we created a custom field at sales order line item level using custom fields app. When I don't enable SAP GUI for this field, I see the field correctly and I can update it manually. However, when an API creates order, we can't see the value in this field. However, the value is stored at database level. So, we enabled the SAP GUI. Now, we see the same field appearing on screen twice. I can update different values in both fields. When order is created via API, only one field gets updated.

I'm not sure if there is something I missed while creating the custom field or it is a SAP bug. Can someone help?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Which SAP Sales Cloud Capabilities make sense for your business?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community! 


When it comes to sales, every business has its own way of working. But one thing is true for everyone: the right tools can make a huge difference in how smoothly things run. That’s why it’s important to take a step back and ask—are we using the right capabilities to support our sales team?

With SAP Sales Cloud, there are many capabilities designed to help sales teams work smarter, not harder. The challenge isn’t just having these tools but knowing which ones will actually make an impact. For example, if keeping track of customer interactions feels messy, Account and Contact Management can help centralize information so teams can collaborate better. If you want to improve forecasting and visibility into your pipeline, Opportunity and Pipeline Management can provide a clearer picture of sales progress. Or maybe you need to improve pricing accuracy—Price Management can help ensure consistency across deals. Need better customer engagement? Sales Lead Management helps track and nurture leads to increase conversion rates. If your team spends too much time on manual processes, Order Capture can simplify sales by automating order entry and connecting with backend systems.

To help businesses identify the capabilities that fit their needs, we have created a conversation of value called Increase Sales Force Efficiency, this is a great starting point to explore the different capabilities in SAP Sales Cloud and identify which one makes sense for your business. Additionally, we’ve developed a more detailed e-learning course, Value Package to Increase Your Sales Force Efficiency, which provides a deeper look into these capabilities, along with extra guidance and additional resources. 

Both assets are available in SAP Learning Hub. To access them, you'll need to complete a one-time registration. You can find all the details and sign up here: SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support.

Investing time in the right sales capabilities can make a big difference in how your team works and how your business grows. Whether you're looking to improve efficiency, streamline processes, or give your sales team better tools, SAP Sales Cloud has a range of features to help you.

Easy steps, amazing CX!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

Edmar Rodríguez is a Topic Expert for the SAP Customer Experience Value Map. He helps customers make the most of their SAP Enterprise Support maintenance contract by guiding them through the available tools and services at their disposal. 

Have questions or want to keep the conversation going? We’d love to hear from you! Feel free to reach out to the SAP Customer Experience Value Map team at SAPESValueMaps@sap.com. And if you haven’t yet, sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps to explore more resources, best practices, and expert guidance.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - Distribution process
entry.content:
Hi @Miche1984, 

I’m curious about the need to post the difference in accrual separately—is there a specific reason for this approach? Would it not be more effective to apply the logic of reversing open accruals only up to the net settlement amount?

It is now possible (though I don’t recall the exact version in which this was introduced) to restrict the system from reversing more accruals than the net settlement amount in a manual settlement process.

To apply this logic, you need to:

  1. Maintain Routine 91 in the manual pricing procedure for the REA5 condition type (or its equivalent).
  2. Activate the relevant setting in the Process Variant configuration (see below).



Another approach would be to add that logic to reverse open accrual up to net amount in a custom routine in copy of 91 only for manual settlement, if the above solution is not possible for existing live contract. 

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Re: How to attach FE OP Controller Extension function to...
entry.content: Is see now that dataReceived is Since: 1.106.0. I work on 1.102.2.

entry.title: Re: Convert DMS Folder ID to Name in Automation
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thanks for the response.  I have the ObjectID of the Folder which contains the document in the DMS.  But this ObjectID is a string the JSON.  I need to show the link to this document in the Approval Form.  So how do I bind this ObjectID to the Approval form input which is a document folder type.  

Process steps: 

  1. Created the folder in DMS
  2. Created the file inside in the folder in DMS
  3. How do I take the object ID of the folder in the first step and bind it to the document folder type variable (input to the approval form).  It is not allowing me to bind the string to the document folder type.  Do I need to use the custom java script to do this ?

entry.title: Re: Reverse Tax Engine - Payroll USA
entry.content:
Hello -

I'm going to call out some members that I know have been around as long as I have or longer to see if you can offer some insight on this MA issue we've run into.

@Matt_Fraser @Brandyn_Richmon @EunaLee @rosette_vaughn2 @jwiblepasshe22 

You may not have any employees in MA, but I didn't think it could hurt to ask because I just can't see that we are the only customer with this issue.

Thanks,

Alicia

entry.title: Modification of accounting accounts for their allocation from the maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I have a question regarding the implementation of the PM module or has the following case arisen in any company or do you think it is possible?

The scenario is about being able to modify the accounting account of the material from the maintenance order,

That is, if a material example: X2569 - points to the accounting account that has the name "Masonry" and is used in maintenance order #1 of a "civil engineering" service, it is correct. 
But if in order #2 the same material X2569 is required but this service is for "Plumbing" that in the maintenance order it can be modified and the corresponding accounting account can be placed which will affect in this case the accounting account called "plumbing".

Is this possible if I have a wide catalog of accounts depending on the maintenance specialty?

Thank you very much in advance for instructing me.
Best regards
Ana

entry.title: Re: SAP DBTech JDBC: [403]: internal error: Cannot get re...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no easy answer for cases of an initial connection timeout. My presumption would be that something is tying up the connection attempt unrelated to the target database, i.e.:

  • Firewall
  • Proxy/Reverse Proxy Server
  • Load balancer

That said, some reasons why HANA may not respond in time to a new connection request (resulting in such timeouts) include:

  • Low available compute resources (near 100% CPU utilization)
  • System tied up in memory resource management (OOM, resource container shrinks, etc.)
  • Failover to a replication site

Considering the context of this post (attempting to register a remote HANA database for smart data access) my feeling would be that this is likely related to network infrastructure.

If you would like to take the SAP software out of the equation to validate that there is an external problem, I would suggest testing with another ODBC client (e.g. isql) using the same HANA ODBC driver. This is a nice sanity check to ensure that all ODBC clients are similarly affected.

entry.title: Re: Reverse Tax Engine - Payroll USA
entry.content:
@alicia_robinson Carlos is not available. 
I took a look at the case, and as far as I could see you got an answer from Development Team and they created a pilot note, Isn´t it? Were you able to test it? If this is not solved, you can send the case back to SAP. 

If you need an answer for an specific case that you have already opened, please reach out the CIC.
The contact number is available in SAP note 560499. As we don´t check old blogs in a regular basis. 

Kind regards,
Graziela

entry.title: Re: Day end report print result
entry.content:
Hi Tharindu. If you are using Sales Sets, the discount amount is generated due to the difference between the list prices and the discounted prices of the sales set.  Let me know if it works for you.

Regards,

Armando.

entry.title: Schema in Document Information Extraction for Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction (4X9)
entry.content:
I have set up scope item 4X9 Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction in my S/4HANA 2023 Private Cloud environment. When uploading the purchase order PDF, there are corrections I would like to make that I have actioned in the Document Information Extraction application on BTP. I have corrected the fields, associated the document with the template, and assigned the template to schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema.

When I upload the PDF in the Document Information Extraction UI, I can select this schema and the template is applied correctly. 

However, when using the UI in S/4HANA, in this case the "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" fiori app, the document shows up in Document Information Extraction UI but it shows the message

"Schema associated with this document has been deleted."

Is this expected behaviour? Is it possible to associate this app "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" (Scope item 4X9) with a particular schema for Purchase Orders? Or perhaps change the association in Document Information Extraction to use the schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema when the inbound document is a Purchase Order, which is correctly identified in the header.

The plan I have selected in BTP for Document Information Extraction is the basic plan, not the premium plan.

Any guidance is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Reverse Tax Engine - Payroll USA
entry.content:
@graziela We did apply the note and we are still testing.  I do still have one concern and that is that YS is not being built in the period 1 payroll's BSI interface.  It only starts in period 2 which makes the YTD YS in the BSI interface not equal to the /S01 in the payroll results.  We just wanted to do more testing and gather more data before replying back to SAP.  It just seems impossible we are the only customer with this issue which is why I was trying to reach other customers.

Thanks,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori launchpad: Hiding empty spaces and pages
entry.content:
Hi Sergio.,

At this stage we are expecting that it will be included with SAP S/4HANA release 2025. That is yet to be officially confirmed so please keep watch for that. 

Worth knowing that SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 and higher already has the merging features for spaces and pages which reduce the need for hiding empty pages.

entry.title: Re: TCode: /SCWM/QRSETUP (Argument: Inspection Type Detai...
entry.content:
NOTE: Maintain fields to activate inspection type and task list on /SCWM/QRSETUP to maintain inspection rule: External System/ Installation 

Activate IOT for your Warehouse Number (EWM)
IMG: Extended Warehouse Management→Cross-Process Settings→Quality Management→Basics and
Integration→Warehouse-Dependent Activation of Inspection Object Type (View /SCWM/QIOTWM

Field Value

Warehouse No. 
Insp. Obj. Type4

General Settings

Activate IOT | Selected
Number Range | SIOT4
External System | SAP_ERP_QM⁶
Installation | <SID_CLN>, for example, B9V_001⁷
Item Type | SITM04
Decis. InspDoc | Inspection Document Decided with Code of Elements
Chg. Prod/Bat. | Selected
Canc. Dec. Elements | Selected
Can Change Qty | Selected
Act. Decision | Selected

Goods Receipt Processes (Delivery-Based & Synchronous Postings)

Prod. Presampling | Not selected
By Delivery Item | Not selected
GR Control | Not selected
Split Ext Sample Qty | Don't Split External Sample Quantity
Certificate Proc. | Not selected

Delivery-Based Inspections & Warehouse-Internal Inspections

Follow-UpAct. LF | Inspection Planning at Goods Receipt
Acceptance Sampling | Not selected

entry.title: Re: TCode: /SCWM/QRSETUP (Argument: Inspection Type Detai...
entry.content:
Maintain Ext System and Installation to activate Inspection Type and Task List fields on /SCWM/QRSETUP screen. Refer config guide.

  1. EWM_ERP_QM_Basic_Inspection_Process
  2. Decentral_EWM_on_S4_QM_Integration_Guide_V2_6_FINAL   (Page: 12/40)

General Settings

Activate IOT | Selected
Number Range | SIOT4
External System | SAP_ERP_QM
Installation | <SID_CLN>, for example, B9V_001
Item Type | SITM04
Decis. InspDoc | Inspection Document Decided with Code of Elements
Chg. Prod/Bat. | Selected
Canc. Dec. Elements | Selected
Can Change Qty | Selected
Act. Decision | Selected

Goods Receipt Processes (Delivery-Based & Synchronous Postings)

Prod. Presampling | Not selected
By Delivery Item | Not selected
GR Control | Not selected
Split Ext Sample Qty | Don't Split External Sample Quantity
Certificate Proc. | Not selected

Delivery-Based Inspections & Warehouse-Internal Inspections

Follow-UpAct. LF | Inspection Planning at Goods Receipt
Acceptance Sampling | Not selected

entry.title: Re: Convert DMS Folder ID to Name in Automation
entry.content:
let folderId = DMSFolderJSON.succinctProperties['cmis:objectId'];

// Construct the object ID string
let objectId = "spa-res:cmis:folderid:" + folderId;

return objectId;
 
Invalid Argument: Type (string) of Output DMSFolderDocType is not valid $.dMSFileFolder(spa-res:cmis:folderid:gDkAX_sk9nMrtQX0TL1BkFXp26ID4sPOqxG4ULwuqq8)"

entry.title: Re: How to Add Fiscal Year Variants in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: We are in Public Cloud and used a 4-4-5 Fiscal year period using SZ Fiscal Year variant, however the start date and end date of some of the periods need to change in the current fiscal year, however this is not possible if we already have Transactional Data in DEV , we don't even have transactional data in PRD yet as we're not LIVE however SAP doesn't allow a change.  This should be more flexible - any suggestions?

entry.title: TM Status tab missing in SO & PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have done the configs like defining Logistics Integration profile, assigning the same to the document types etc. But I can't see the TM Status tab in SO & PO. However the FUs are getting generated when I checked the table /SCMTMS/D_TORROT.

Can you please help/guide me on what could be missing in order to have the TM Status tab in SO & PO.

#SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: TM Status tab missing in SO & PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have done the configs like defining Logistics Integration profile, assigning the same to the document types etc. But I can't see the TM Status tab in SO & PO.

However the FUs are getting generated when I checked the table /SCMTMS/D_TORROT. These FUs are also showing up in Transportation Cockpit & am also able to plan these FUs to create FO.

Can you please help/guide me on what could be missing in order to have the TM Status tab in SO & PO.

Regards,

Naleenkumar B

#SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml .
entry.content:
Xpath not working. I have to retrieve the two fields company code and partner from the below xml . not sure what is incorrect , any help will be highly appreciated

My xml –

<feed xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices xml:base=https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><author><name/></author><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD(P_IDNUMBER='954100')/Set" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet"/><entry><id>https://ns2ds4app1.sap.global.lmco.com:44400/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS/ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</id><title type="text">ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')</title><updated>2025-02-13T20:45:56Z</updated><category term="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCD_CDS.ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType" scheme=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')" rel="self" title="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDType"/><link href="ZI_SC_AP220_GET_PARTNR_CCDSet(P_IDNUMBER='954100',IDNUMBER='954100')/Parameters" rel=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/Parameters type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="Parameters"/><content type="application/xml"><m:properties xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices><d:P_IDNUMBER>954100</d:P_IDNUMBER><d:IDNUMBER>954100</d:IDNUMBER><d:PARTNER>40000</d:PARTNER><d:COMPANYCODE>1000</d:COMPANYCODE></m:properties></content></entry></feed>

XPath –

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:COMPANYCODE

/feed/entry/content/m:properties/d:PARTNER

Runtime config- namepace mapping

xmlns:m=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata;xmlns:d=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices;xmlns:p1=http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN

entry.title: Re: Convert DMS Folder ID to Name in Automation
entry.content: My Process is read the file from the Inbox of an emailbox and load it to the DMS, which is done.  But I want to show the same document that is loaded to the DMS to be shown as file link in the Approval Form.  All the materials that are there are for uploading the document in the request form and bind it to the approval form.  I don't have a request form in my process and my process starts with email checking with a 5 minute timed trigger.  I am struggling to see how I can bind that document info - Objectid, objectType and object name info the document folder type in the approval form.  This is not very clear in the Process automation.

entry.title: Re: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
I am facing the same issue.
I did same process last week and everything worked well, but since yesterday 13/02/2025, I got same issue though I deleted/recreate trial account.

entry.title: Re: Use uploaded documents in Process Automation API Trigger
entry.content:
Hi all,

This solution will work only when there is a request form where you are easily binding the output of the request form to the input to the approval form.  If there is no request form to upload the document and the document is already available in the DMS with other process, how can I recover the CMIS document and bind it to the document folder type variable in the input of approval form.  I have the folder objectid which contains the document in DMS and it is not very clear how to bind the objectid of DMS folder containing the document to the documenttype variable in approval form to show the document for downloading.

entry.title: Re: i have upgraded hybris version from 2011 to 2205.30 a...
entry.content:
Greetings!

Version 2205 introduced the theme functionality on Backoffice, so the issue maybe some broke CSS which is usually resolved by Resetting Backoffice Configuration. However, if the problem persists, you may need to follow steps described in SAP UXC (UX Consistency) Adaption | SAP Help Page.

Another possible cause which is not that common, is that the ootb media from themes (the themes' styles are saved as medias) where not impex'ed during the upgrade to the newer version, you can try to import that using the following impex:

$catalogVersion=catalogVersion(catalog(id[default='_boconfig']),version[default='hidden'])[unique=true]
$siteImageResource=jar:com.hybris.backoffice.constants.BackofficeConstants&/impex/images
$siteThemeResource=jar:com.hybris.backoffice.constants.BackofficeConstants&/backoffice/generated/cockpitng/cng/css/themes
$thumbnail=thumbnail(code, $catalogVersion)
$style=style(code, $catalogVersion)

# Insert thumbnail
INSERT_UPDATE Media; code[unique=true]; $catalogVersion; @Media[translator=de.hybris.platform.impex.jalo.media.MediaDataTranslator][forceWrite=true]; mime[default = 'image/png']; folder(qualifier)[default = backofficethemes]
                   ;backoffice_theme_quartz_light_thumbnail;;$siteImageResource/sap_quartz_light.png;;
                   ;backoffice_theme_quartz_dark_thumbnail;;$siteImageResource/sap_quartz_dark.png;;
                   ;backoffice_theme_morning_horizon_thumbnail;;$siteImageResource/sap_morning_horizon.png;;

# Insert style
INSERT_UPDATE Media; code[unique=true]; $catalogVersion; @Media[translator=de.hybris.platform.impex.jalo.media.MediaDataTranslator][forceWrite=true]; mime[default = 'text/css']; folder(qualifier)[default = backofficethemes]
;backoffice_theme_quartz_light_style;;$siteThemeResource/sap_fiori_3/variables.css;;
;backoffice_theme_quartz_dark_style;;$siteThemeResource/sap_fiori_3_dark/variables.css;;
;backoffice_theme_morning_horizon_style;;$siteThemeResource/sap_horizon/variables.css;;

# Set thumbnail and style for theme
INSERT_UPDATE Theme; code[unique=true]; $style; styleVersion; $thumbnail
                   ;sap_fiori_3;backoffice_theme_quartz_light_style;1;backoffice_theme_quartz_light_thumbnail
                   ;sap_fiori_3_dark;backoffice_theme_quartz_dark_style;1;backoffice_theme_quartz_dark_thumbnail
                   ;sap_horizon;backoffice_theme_morning_horizon_style;1;backoffice_theme_morning_horizon_thumbnail

# Insert constraint
INSERT_UPDATE NotNullConstraint;id[unique = true];severity(code);active;target;type(code);qualifier;descriptor(enclosingType(code),qualifier);
;CustomThemeCodeNotNullConstraint;ERROR;true;com.hybris.backoffice.model.CustomThemeModel;CustomTheme;code;CustomTheme:code;

It may fail if you don't have the _boconfig catalog, which is also a problem, in that case, you can try top run ant updatesystem

entry.title: Re: CJ88/CJ8G-Controlling the amount of money to be settled
entry.content:
Hi MarcioBlos,

It's correct because we want to settle 100% of the amount as of the period covered by the settlement.

entry.title: Re: CJ88/CJ8G-Controlling the amount of money to be settled
entry.content:
Hi Marcio Blos,

Thank you for your reply.

I'll check the KKA2 exit.

entry.title: iOS native app - Offline OData DataFormat
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to build an Offline first application, that uses deltaTokens to help reduce the amount of data downloaded when syncing, as there may be a lot of data including attachments that need to be downloaded. I have found that the OfflineODataProvider does not use XML as the accepted request and response format, even though I have set the service options to accept XML.

 

let offline = ODataNotifications(
   provider: offlineProvider
)
offline.serviceOptions.dataFormat = DataFormat.atom

 

This same code works perfectly when using the onlinService, but fails when trying to open the offline store, as the offlineService always sends "application/json" as the accepted format.

What else can I do to force the offlineService to send the request as xml??

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted d...
entry.content: encrypted db not in dbo use mode, Any granular level access other then sa_role

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Layer SQLQueries OSRT or ORST
entry.content: Thanks for pointing out this issue. I think this is a mistake and should be corrected.

entry.title: 7019011 S/4HANA Retail f merch mgmt, fir 1000un
entry.content:
Hi. Please help us how to activate this licence (DIGITS S/4HANA Retail f merch mgmt, fir 1000un) in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 7019011 S/4HANA Retail f merch mgmt, fir 1000un
entry.content: Please refer to KBA 2366280 - How to request a license key for SAP S/4HANA (all versions) - SAP for Me

entry.title: How to Create MRP Area and mapping with Product material master App
entry.content:
Hello, I am writing an inquiry because I have a question about the MRP area.

The plant is 4310 and the MRP area is 4310A.

After that, when I try to map the MRP area in the product master management app, the following error appears.
I would really appreciate it if you could let me know the solution.

entry.title: Turn Off ML Categorization based on Ticket Type
entry.content:
Hi - is there a way to turn off ML Categorization for Service Cloud v1 based on Ticket type? For example, we only want to Turn on the ML for ticket types "Service Request", as for others, it shouldn't be working.

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: 通过外部供应商发来的IDOC，自动调用MIRO，创建供应商发票校验并产生财务凭证
entry.content: 供应商发来IDOC信息，调用MIRO的功能，创建发票校验并产生财务凭证。SAP应该调用那个Function Module.  EDI 部分如何配置。我查到网上有建议用Function Module "IDOC_INPUT_INVOIC_FI" which is linked to Basic Idoc type INVOIC02 and message type INVOIC

entry.title: Re: Generate Custom Legal Certificates in SAP DRC
entry.content:
Thank you Prashant for the very nice blog and for helping us on our issue.

For context, we had an issue with PH 2307 registered name due to the recent update logic on CDS C_PH_STRPWHLDGTAXITEMQ where name is equal to the concatenated value of name 1 to 4 of the supplier. 

Note: we are on S4H Public Cloud, some steps might not be applicable for private cloud.

To solved the issue, Prashant/SAP recommended to use the legal reporting compliance to redo the form mapping and have the freedom to set the values based on the requirement. Below were the steps we've done to do it.

1. Create a new schema to have a new custom data source for PH 2307 form. This was done in the development system. 

2. Create a new class/methods that will give the values we needed. We have reused the standard class srf_msg_handler -> get_report_run_by_id -> execute_query to get the data from an existing query. From this, we manipulated, add and delete data based on our requirement.

3. Extend the standard Report definition through define statutory reports.

4. Create new query using the new methods created.

5. Create new document definition, assign the custom schema created and map the values based on the exporting data of the new methods.


Note: since we need to generated form per unique supplier and needs to get the unique details of each of them. Split query was used in the document definition. Split query works as having the main data splitting the data to the methods we created to get the individual data (more on the condition).

6.  Last steps was to create a new data connection on the form using the new schema and bind the fields to the new mapping/source via Adobe LiveCycle.

entry.title: Hello SAP Community
entry.content: Hi everyone, my name is Prashant, and I am a techno-functional architect specializing in the SuccessFactors Recruiting module. I’m here to learn from and share knowledge with all of you.

entry.title: Re: Problem with FM CSAI_BOM_MAINTAIN
entry.content: I found same message in my program can you give solution for this?

entry.title: The field MARA-MSTAE, MARC-MMSTA, MARA-MSTAV, MVKE-VMSTA
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I would like to understand if fields MARA-MSTAE, MARC-MMSTA, MARA-MSTAV, MVKE-VMSTA is blank in S/4 system what will be the impact and why is it mandatory when moving from ECC to S4 system.

 

Thank You

entry.title: Re: can i edit my own blog?
entry.content: Thanks for sharing info. It's a very SAP-like button haha

entry.title: Re: HTTP ERROR 403 in AP Build Apps design-time
entry.content: Hi, I'm facing the same issue. I was working on building apps as usual, but today when I try to open the design page of my apps, I encounter an error. Can you help me figure out how to fix this?

entry.title: EWA alert for SAP IQ through Solman
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please confirm can we enable below two options for SAP IQ database through SOLMAN EWA report?

Note: SAP IQ  is a database server.

  • BUSINESS process analysis
  • DATA Volume management 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWA alert for SAP IQ through Solman
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

SAP IQ does not support IQ DB as a standalone product. The IQ DB needs to be connected to a managed system as described in SAP Note 2378876 - EarlyWatch Alert for SAP IQ Database. Once done some checks/sections for the IQ DB will appear in the EWA for the managed system.

For Business Process Analysis in the EWA report, KBA 2282310 - Business Key Figures for EWA report states the detailed information. The BPA process is available for ERP and S/4HANA system, and it is not available for Solution Manager.

For DATA Volume Management in EWA, please see prerequisites in Note 2036442 - EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) - Data Volume Management (DVM).   

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Archiving Settlement documents with CO_KABR
entry.content:
Hi Ronald, 

Help link for the archiving object

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/a87b965528884868b4404902123c6004/5059d7531a4d424de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&version=2023.002&q=CO_KABR

If you want to schedule ILM enabled archiving, then you need to configure the system accordingly. 

1. Activate the business function ILM. 

2. Assign the ILM object(mapped to your archiving object) to an audit area for retention rules. 

3. Maintain active retention policy with relevant retention rules for your ILM object. 

With this settings in place, you will be able to schedule ILM enabled archiving. 

Regards,

Revathi

entry.title: Re: Using Apache Kafka for messaging in the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) – Part 1/2
entry.content:
I hope if I may be a bit cheeky and ask...

For SAP ERP onprem solution whats the way to go to integrate kafka with SAP. We have a SAP enterprise license. Were told we should use Hana Streaming analytics but now i when i try it out i see that Hana Streaming analytics is very old requires old kafka jars as far as i can work out even with CVEs. 

One of these as you say.

  • SAP Event Mesh (as part of Integration Suite)
  • SAP Advanced Event Mesh
  • SAP Cloud Application Event Hub

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Launchpad - Scheduled Reports are Blank but Run Fine in Web Intelligence
entry.content: did you check all the prompts, schedule options and refresh settings ?
